what_it_does: It is a living, open-ended foundation reference for building a personalized AI Company around Tim, capturing his cognitive style, communication protocols, architectural laws, vocabulary, progressive brief layers, and preserved primary sources so future AI agents can read and extend it across sessions.
observations: Explicitly rejects closure-form writing in favor of open-future, additive, dated, layered updates.
States two load-bearing laws: Tim is the foundation, and information is revealed progressively.
Defines an AI-only operating model with zero human developers and multi-session continuity via memory files.
Lists hard anti-patterns: do not summarize dense messages, do not treat examples as specs, do not force MVP, do not lose Tim's vocabulary, offer names not lectures.
Frames Tim's build method as constructive dialogue where the conversation itself is the construction.
Contains four progressive brief layers: purpose, Company framing, open-future writing mode, and one-entity coherence.
Preserves Tim's dense messages as primary sources alongside synthesized claims.
Includes a local AI substrate inventory (vLLM, embeddings, Ollama, models) as a foundation slab.
Introduces canonical vocabulary: Company, Commander, Crew, Departments, Ship, Polymath, open-future mode, ground level.
Adds operational rules such as the Skim Test, spiral-review, branch+return, no-repeat KPI, and a friction taxonomy.
standouts: The document is itself a Company component, not mere documentation; the artefact is the construction.
Open-future writing mode is treated as load-bearing architecture, not style.
Tim's cognition and vocabulary are the sole design primitive; generic-user assumptions are explicitly invalid.
The Company must present as one coherent entity to Tim while internally differentiated.
Success function is the multiplier on Tim's output, not throughput or task completion.
conventions: Additive, dated, layered revision with explicit open markers and provisional language.
Preserves primary sources next to synthesis to prevent interpretation drift.
Uses headers, bold claims, and first-sentence bottom-lines to pass the Skim Test.
Breaks standard closure-form documentation by avoiding is/consists of/final-list language.
Breaks generic AI collaboration defaults: no binary confirmations, no code-as-medium, no MVP default.
concerns: The heavy meta-instruction layer could become self-referential and hard to maintain.
Many architectural mechanisms are explicitly open/undesigned, leaving large implementation gaps.
Length and density may challenge the Skim Test it prescribes.
Claim register is described but not yet structured, risking inconsistent provenance marking.
The tension between Tim as sole foundation and proactive AI insights could drift if not carefully labeled.
notes: A self-aware, anti-closure foundation memo that turns Tim's cognitive style and progressive brief into an institutional memory substrate for an AI-only Company.
questions: What is the first concrete project or task Tim will direct after the onboarding phase?
How will the one-entity coherent-voice mechanism be implemented across internal specialists?
What is the exact claim-register format and how will it propagate across memory entries?
How will correction-propagation and the no-repeat KPI be operationalized?
How will this document relate to the parallel ~/company/foundation/system/ branch?
Which departments, roles, and agent jobs will actually exist?
How will modes be detected, switched, and represented technically?
Is the system intended to stay local-only or eventually serve external users?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — it is a living, layered reference read before substantial work and updated as Tim reveals more; it also explicitly functions as an active construction artifact, which is consistent with its stated role.
apparent_themes: Expansion over compression of dense messages
Friction elimination as the success function
intention_signals: It tries to create a self-extending, session-spanning cognitive scaffold so future AI instances can operate as a single Tim-aligned Company without forcing Tim to repeat himself or conform to generic tooling.
novelty: It explicitly rejects closure-form documentation and MVP thinking, treats a foundation document as a live system component, and embeds communication protocols like Skim Test, open-future mode, spiral-review, and branch+return as architectural primitives.
contribution: It contributes a rich, Tim-specific context layer of laws, anti-patterns, vocabulary, brief layers, and preserved primary sources that a fused system would keep to preserve alignment and continuity across AI sessions.
summary_for_embedding: TIM.md is a living, open-ended foundation document that captures Tim's cognitive style, communication protocols, and progressive brief for an AI-only personalized Company, intended to be read and extended by future AI agents across sessions.
intention_for_embedding: To serve as the institutional memory and alignment substrate that lets successive AI instances operate as one Tim-centered entity without closure-form drift.
